notes: 2026-06-02: Added standalone DFPlayer MP3 serial demo tool under cmd/dfplayer-demo for 9600 8N1 playback verification (reset -> volume 20 -> play 0001/0002/0003 -> stop). Documented usage in mydocs/DFPLAYER_MP3_SERIAL_USAGE.md. This is exploratory side work and is not yet integrated into the main rdk-webrtc service.
